Notes: Stefanie Lang becomes first women's basketball player in school history
to record 1,000 points, 700 rebounds and 100 blocks.
Game.Location: The Cutler Event Center; Olivet, Mich.
Game.Officials: Perry Costello,  Nicole Tilma,  Donald Slater
